markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the specified word or phrase is stated by President Trump.
markets.no_sub_title: Nancy / Pelosi
markets.rules_primary: If Nancy / Pelosi, or a plural or possessive form of Nancy / Pelosi, is stated by Donald Trump before Mar 16, 2026 at 12:00am ET, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The word or phrase must be stated by President Donald Trump in public statements, direct quotes published by Source Agencies, or written public statements on his personal social media accounts (Twitter/Truth Social). Official acts like Executive Orders or bills signed do not count. Grammatical inflections for plurals and possessives are included (e.g., "immigrant" includes "immigrants" and "immigrant's"), but other tense inflections, hyphenated compounds, and synonyms are not included. For phrases with slashes like "Doge/Dogecoin," either word satisfies the criterion. If the word must be said a minimum number of times, all instances must occur after market issuance.
markets.title: Will Trump say "Nancy / Pelosi" before Mar 16, 2026?
